# Twilio Labs

## What is Twilio Labs?

Twilio Labs host a variety of open-source projects that were developed by people
at Twilio and the community. Every one of these projects welcomes contributions.

Feel free to submit issues, fixes or suggestions to improvements for the projects.

*Let's build something amazing.*

## Examples

Here are some projects that are currently active:

* [Serverless Toolkit](/docs/labs/serverless-toolkit): Collection of tools around [Twilio Functions and Assets](https://www.twilio.com/en-us/serverless)

  * [twilio-run](https://github.com/twilio-labs/twilio-run): Develop locally and deploy to Twilio Functions
  * [serverless-api](https://github.com/twilio-labs/serverless-api): Node.js wrapper for the Twilio Functions and Assets API
  * [function-templates](https://github.com/twilio-labs/function-templates): Collection of Function templates for Twilio Functions
  * [create-twilio-function](https://github.com/twilio-labs/create-twilio-function): CLI to bootstrap Twilio Function projects
  * [plugin-serverless](https://github.com/twilio-labs/plugin-serverless): A plugin for Twilio CLI to use `twilio-run`
  * [serverless-framework-integration](https://github.com/twilio-labs/serverless-framework-integration): Twilio Functions and Assets Integration for Serverless Framework
* [Twilio Firebase Extensions](https://github.com/twilio-labs/twilio-firebase-extensions/): A collection of plug-and-play extensions for Firebase users to integrate different Twilio functionality.
* [plugin-token](https://github.com/twilio-labs/plugin-token): A plugin for the Twilio CLI to generate access tokens for client-side SDKs
* [svg-to-react](https://github.com/twilio-labs/svg-to-react): Tool that generates React components out of SVG files
* [plugin-flex-realtime-stats-dashboard](https://github.com/twilio-labs/plugin-flex-realtime-stats-dashboard): Sample Twilio Flex plugin for a real-time stats solution
* [plugin-flex-outbound-dialpad](https://github.com/twilio-labs/plugin-flex-outbound-dialpad): Sample Twilio Flex plugin for a dial pad solution that allows for conferencing and supervisor monitor

## Code of Conduct

Your safety and comfort are important to us. Codes of Conduct let everyone know what's expected, so we can do a better job of interacting with one another. All contributions to and interactions with Twilio's open-source projects have to adhere to our Code of Conduct. You can report violations at [open-source@twilio.com](mailto:open-source@twilio.com).

[Read the Code of Conduct](https://github.com/twilio-labs/.github/blob/master/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
